      "text": "Tadeht ta fakka tas
KUNGS Zebaot: Rangi/ es
gribbu tohs peemekeht/ un teem
Jannekteem buhs zanr Sohbinn
nomirt/ winnu Dehli/ nn wik-
nu Meitas nomirs Baddá/ ka
no teem neneeka atlïks.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo es weddischnu Laannu-
mu pahr teem Wihreim no A-
natota/ tai Gaddá winnu Pee-
meklechanas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XII. Nodalla.
Jeremhus fuhs pahr ts Labklabichanu to
Besdeewigo schinni Pasaulē: 1. Tas to
meir noteek teem par ihpaschu Bohja.Ee-
schanu: 3. Suhs pahr Jspohstischanu tahs
Semmes: 4. Un pahr teem ne-ustizzigeem
Ganneem: ro. Kurreem wiꞥsch lihdsar teem
Judeem taiju Sohdibu fluddina: 14.
Tomehr buhs teem Judeem atkat Schehla-
sibu ardabbuht: 15. Un lihds ar teem Pa-
gazeem pee Kristus Walstibas peepulzina:
teem tapt: 16.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "1. Sll/ ak KUNGS! palee-
zi taifsns/ jepthu es ar
tewini gribbetu teefahf/
tomehr gribbu es no Teefsß ar
tewin runnaht. Kapehz to Bes-
deewigo Zettam labbi isdoh-
dahs? un wisfeem/ kas Blehnas
dsenn labbi klahjahs?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "2. Tu effi tohs dehstijs/ un
tee irr faknoifschees/ un aug/ un
nefs Augtus/ Tu* gann effi tu-
wu winno Mutte/ bet tahfu
no winno Jhktim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "* Tas irr: Tee ar fawu Mutti gann no
tewim leelijahs, bet winnu Ihktis rawu Soh-
dibu ne juht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "3. Bet tu/ ak KUNGS!
mannis pasihstt/ tu redsi manni/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "nn pahrmanni mannu Sirđi/
kas ar tewim irraid; Bet tohs
aisgrahhi tu ka Awis uhs Kan-
tchanu/ un taupi tohs uhs No-
kauschanas Deemu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "4. Zik ilgi tad ta Semme
behdatees? nn ta Sahle us Tib-
rumu fawihtihg/ tahs Blehdi-
bas deht to/ kas eekfch tahs dsih-
wo/ eet Lohpi un Putni bohjá?
Tapehz ka tee fakka: Winsch ne
reds/ ka mumis pehz Gallá klaħ-
sees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "5. Kad tu ar Kahjineekem
tezzi/ un tee tewi peekause/ ka
warrefi tu tad tezzetees ar Jaht-
neekeem? Un ja tas tai Semmē
tew noteek/ kur Meers irr/ un
us ko tu pataujees / fo tu tad
darrist pee ta uspluhduicha
Jardana?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "6. Jo tik labbi tawi Brahti/
ka tawa Tehwa Nrans/ ir tee
paschi turrahs nepeetizzigt prett
tewi/ un fanz ar pilnu Mutti
tewi pakkat. Ne ustizz teem/
kad tee laipnigi ar tewin runna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "7. Es esinu fawu Namimu
atslahjis/ un mannu eemanto-
jamu Teefu pamettis/ un to/ fo
manna Dwehfele mihloja/ win-
nas Eenaidneekem Rohka dewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "8. Woj manna Eemanto-
schana man irr tappusi ka weens
Lauwa Meschá? ta irr fawu
Balkfai prett manni pazehlafi/
tadeht esinu es to eenihdejs?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "9. Woj manna Eemantotsba-
na man irr ka weens raibs Put-
nis/ apkahrt fo tee (plehtigi)
R
"
    }
